svg.title: Phase 8 — AI QC technical diagram
svg.desc: Technical flow of QC worker, vision model call, score gate, rework request generation, rework cap and escalation

g.text: Fetches original URL · latest edit_version URL · analysis_result from DB
original + edited + catalog refs + analysis findings + output spec → QC JSON schema
score · pass_fail · failed_checks[] · feedback[] · regions[] · new_artifacts[]
feedback_json · regions[] · cycle_no++ · linked to qc_result_id
Model: GPT-5.5 (same as analysis) · Threshold: 90 (fixed) · DB: qc_result + rework_request · Cap: 3 cycles
